title: Gentle Eating
subtitle: Listening to your body's signals
description: At this stage, nausea or food aversions may become more noticeable. Eating what feels comfortable in small amounts and staying hydrated can help you stay nourished without discomfort.
what_to_expect: Increased nausea or sensitivity to certain foods
Possible food aversions or reduced appetite
Need for very light and tolerable meals
nutrition_focus: Eat small portions based on comfort
Stay hydrated even if eating feels difficult
recommended_foods: Light foods like khichdi, curd rice, and plain dal
Fruits like banana, apple, and sweet lime
Simple snacks like toast or crackers
Protein sources like curd, lentils, or eggs (if tolerated)
hydration: Take small sips of water throughout the day
Include coconut water, lemon water, or clear soups
reassurance: Eating what feels comfortable in small amounts is enough during this phase.

diabetes.personalized_description: Managing small, frequent meals can help maintain steady energy levels even with nausea.
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils and paneer
diabetes.reassurance: Small and regular meals can help you stay balanced.

anemia.personalized_description: Even with reduced appetite, continuing small amounts of iron-rich foods is helpful.
nutrition_focus: Include iron-rich foods in small portions
Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Even small portions can support your strength over time.

hypertension.personalized_description: Light and simple meals can help maintain comfort and support stable blood pressure.
hypertension.reassurance: Simple meals can help you feel more comfortable and balanced.

thyroid.personalized_description: Maintaining a consistent eating pattern supports balance even during appetite changes.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency in eating supports your body's balance.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, focusing on small, light, and regular meals can help maintain balance during discomfort.
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Gentle nourishment is enough to support your body right now.
